metadata.name: Respond to an Ethics Hotline Report

description: An anonymous report has been submitted through the ethics hotline alleging fraudulent expense reporting by a manager.

nodes.task_description: Receive the anonymous report from the ethics hotline system.

expected_outcome.value: The compliance officer receives the case details.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a confidential investigation, partnering with internal audit.

expected_outcome.value: Officer creates a new investigation case and engages the internal audit team.

nodes.task_description: Review the manager's expense reports for the last year to look for anomalies.

expected_outcome.value: The investigation team analyzes the expense reports for policy violations.
